theme: When the room turns into a castle or outer space.
title: Zayn and Rayan's Rug Adventure

spreads.narrative: Zayn is playing in his room, imagining sailing away on his bed. He wishes his room could be a real castle.
spreads.visualFocus: Zayn's blue kite hanging on the wall.
spreads.transitionHook: Suddenly, the room begins to shake and change!
spreads.highlightAction: Zayn sitting on his bed, holding his kite and pretending to sail.

spreads.narrative: The room transforms into a castle, and shadows dance on the walls. Rayan enters the room, also surprised by the change.
spreads.visualFocus: The room transformed into a castle with the bed as a 'boat'.
spreads.highlightAction: The room transforming with strange lighting and shapes.

spreads.narrative: Zayn tries to sail the bed-boat across the rug, but the shadows seem to get closer. He feels scared and stops.
spreads.visualFocus: The bed-boat moving slightly but surrounded by large shadows.
spreads.transitionHook: But they just keep getting scarier...
spreads.highlightAction: Zayn trying to push the bed-boat forward.

spreads.narrative: Rayan suggests they use their night-light. He says, "Maybe it can be our sun!"
spreads.visualFocus: Rayan holding up the small night-light.
spreads.transitionHook: But the night-light seems too small...

spreads.narrative: Zayn feels disappointed and small. The shadows seem overwhelming, and he doubts they can make it.
spreads.visualFocus: Zayn sitting on the bed-boat, looking dejected.
spreads.transitionHook: But then Zayn notices something about the shadows...

spreads.narrative: Zayn realizes that the shadows only appear when it's dark. He suddenly gets an idea
spreads.visualFocus: Zayn's face lighting up with a new idea.
spreads.highlightAction: Zayn gasping as he has an idea.

spreads.narrative: Holding the night-light high, Zayn and Rayan sail the bed-boat. The shadows shrink away as the light moves forward.
spreads.visualFocus: The bed-boat moving forward, illuminated by the night-light.
spreads.transitionHook: Soon, they see the edge of the rug!
spreads.highlightAction: Zayn and Rayan pushing the bed-boat with the night-light shining.

spreads.narrative: They reach the edge of the rug! The room slowly returns to normal, and the shadows disappear. Zayn and Rayan realize that together, they can face any fear.
spreads.visualFocus: The room returning to normal with the shadows gone.
spreads.transitionHook: Now they know that it's not scary.
spreads.highlightAction: Zayn and Rayan smiling at each other as the room transforms back.

structure.arcSummary: Zayn and Rayan's room transforms into a castle, filled with scary shadows. After a failed attempt, they realize that their night-light can help them navigate. Together, they use the 'sun' to sail their bed-boat to safety and realize that facing fears together is easier.

characters.heroProfile: Zayn is curious, imaginative, and a little bit scared of the dark. He loves to play pretend and explore new worlds.

supportingRoles.name: Rayan
supportingRoles.visualKey: Rayan has a wizard outfit with star patterns.
supportingRoles.functionType: To support and encourage Zayn, helping him overcome his fears.

foundation.moral: Facing fears together makes them less scary.
foundation.title: Zayn and Rayan's Rug Adventure
foundation.storyCore: Zayn and Rayan's bedroom magically transforms into a castle, and they must sail their bed-boat across the rug to escape the shadows.
foundation.heroDesire: To sail the Bed-Boat to the edge of the rug and reach safety.
foundation.mainChallenge: Overcoming the scary shadows that appear in the transformed room.
foundation.finalSolutionMethod: Using a night-light as a 'sun' to chase away the shadows.

rawScript.text:
Brave Zayn loves to dream and pretend,
Of big boats and stories that never end.
He sits on his bed, kite in his hand,
Wishing for castles in his own land.

The room shakes! Shadows now dance around,
A castle appears with no sound.
Rayan walks in, eyes open wide,
"What's happening here?" Rayan cried.

Zayn tries to sail, but feels fear start,
The shadows grow close, tearing him apart.
He stops the bed-boat, his face pale and white,
The shadows loom large in the dim evening light.

Rayan then says, with stars in his eyes,
"Our small night-light, a sun in disguise!"
Rayan hands Zayn the light, small and bright,
"Maybe it can help us all through the night!"

Zayn feels small, the shadows so vast,
A heavy heart, a feeling that won't last.
He thinks they can't do it, he feels very low,
The shadows now dance, putting on a show.

Zayn sees then, in the room's dark gloom,
The shadows appear when there's no light in the room!
A big, bright idea now bursts in his head,
"With light we can beat them!" Zayn bravely said.

The light held up high, Zayn feels so bold,
The bed-boat moves on, a story unfolds.
The shadows shrink back, they don't like the sun,
They see the rug's edge, the journey near done!

They reach the rug's edge, the shadows all flee,
The room's now normal, happy and free.
Zayn knows now, though fear may feel real,
That facing it with friends makes any heart heal!

customGoal: To sail the Bed-Boat to the edge of the rug.

spreads.props: Bed-boat (transformed bed), night-light, swirling shadows, stylized waves on the rug.
spreads.lighting: Magical glow, soft light emanating from night-light
spreads.keyActions: Zayn and Rayan are sailing on their bed-boat across a rug transformed into a stormy sea, holding the night-light high. The shadows are receding in front of the bed-boat. Zayn is steering the bed-boat. Rayan is holding the night-light. Zayn has a determined expression.
spreads.colorPalette: Warm yellows and blues, contrasting with dark purples and blues for the shadows.

spreads.props: Zayn's blue kite, Bed, Rug, Toys scattered around the room
spreads.keyActions: Zayn is sitting on his bed, holding his blue kite high above his head, pretending it's a sail. He is smiling dreamily. The room is cozy and familiar.
spreads.colorPalette: Warm and inviting colors, blues and yellows
spreads.continuityNotes: Establish Zayn's room. Blue kite is very important.

spreads.props: Bed transformed into a boat, shadows on the walls, Rayan's star hat
spreads.emotion: Excitement and a bit of fear
spreads.lighting: Strange, shifting shadows and castle-like lighting
spreads.keyActions: Rayan runs into the room, surprised, wearing a star hat. The room transforms into a castle, with shadows dancing on the walls. Zayn is staring in astonishment.
spreads.colorPalette: Dark blues, purples, and greens for the shadows, contrasted with the warmer tones of the original room.
spreads.continuityNotes: The bed transforms into a boat. Maintain consistency in Rayan's appearance.

spreads.props: Bed-boat, large menacing shadows, rug resembling a sea.
spreads.lighting: Dim lighting with large, looming shadows
spreads.keyActions: Zayn is trying to push the bed-boat forward across the rug, but the shadows are getting closer. Zayn looks scared, feeling the shadows grow near.
spreads.colorPalette: Predominantly dark blues and purples, with small areas of light.
spreads.continuityNotes: Shadows become a main element. Rug is sea-like.

spreads.lighting: Dim lighting with a small, gentle spark from the night-light.
spreads.keyActions: Rayan is handing the small night-light to Zayn. Rayan is hopeful. Zayn is hesitant.
spreads.colorPalette: Dark blues and purples, with a small area illuminated by the night-light.
spreads.continuityNotes: The night-light is introduced as a potential solution.

spreads.keyActions: Zayn is sitting dejectedly on the bed-boat, looking down. Rayan stands beside him with concerned expression. Shadows appear vast and insurmountable.
spreads.colorPalette: Almost entirely dark blues and purples, very little light.

spreads.lighting: A sudden bright spark of inspiration on Zayn's face.
spreads.keyActions: Zayn is gasping as he has a sudden idea, face lit up. Rayan looks at Zayn, questioning.
spreads.colorPalette: Mostly dark, but with a bright light illuminating Zayn's face.
spreads.continuityNotes: The turning point - Zayn gets an idea.

spreads.props: Bed-boat, night-light, shrinking shadows, rug edge in sight
spreads.lighting: The night-light illuminates the path ahead, pushing back the shadows.
spreads.keyActions: Zayn and Rayan are pushing the bed-boat forward, holding the night-light high. The shadows are shrinking away from the light. They are determined.
spreads.colorPalette: Warmer tones are returning, pushing back the blues and purples of the shadows.
spreads.continuityNotes: They are using the light to push back the shadows.

spreads.lighting: Soft, normal bedroom lighting, the shadows are gone.
spreads.keyActions: Zayn and Rayan are smiling at each other as the room transforms back to normal. The shadows are gone. The bed is returning to its normal state.
spreads.colorPalette: Back to the original warm and inviting colors of the room.
spreads.continuityNotes: Resolution - the room is back to normal.

characters.heroProfile: Zayn is curious, imaginative, and a little bit scared of the dark. He loves to play pretend and explore new worlds.

supportingRoles.name: Rayan
supportingRoles.visualKey: Rayan has a wizard outfit with star patterns.
supportingRoles.functionType: To support and encourage Zayn, helping him overcome his fears.

visualAnchors.spatialLogic: The rug transforms into a sea around the 'castle' bed.
visualAnchors.signatureItems: Zayn's blue kite, Rayan's star hat, Night-light (sun)
visualAnchors.persistentProps: Bed-boat (bed transformed into a boat), Shadows
visualAnchors.recurringLocations: Zayn and Rayan's bedroom (normal and transformed)

finalPrompts:
Prompt for COVER (Index 0):
**GOAL:** Generate a panoramic image for a children's book that perfectly matches the established character and art style.

**REFERENCE INPUTS:**
- **Character/Style Anchor (IMAGE 1):** This is the **Master Reference**. It defines both the Character Identity (face, hair) and the Artistic Technique (brushwork, color palette). It serves as the sole source of truth for the MAIN HERO.
- **Secondary Character Anchor (IMAGE 2):** This defines the second character (Rayan, 8 year old boy).

**FIXED ASSET MANDATE:**
- The character in IMAGE 1 is a **fixed visual asset**. Place them in the scene described below without modifying their facial features, body proportions, or artistic rendering technique. 
- The character in IMAGE 2 is ALSO a **fixed visual asset**. Place them in the scene alongside IMAGE 1.
- You must **NOT** invent new lighting or rendering logic that conflicts with IMAGE 1. 

**SCENE EXTENSION:**
- Render the environment to match the specific artistic textures and brushwork found in IMAGE 1. The character should feel integrated, but their core style is immutable. 

**COMPOSITION:**
- **FRONT COVER (RIGHT):** Focus on the Child / Hero. Place Rayan here as well, interacting naturally.
- **BACK COVER (LEFT):** This area must be an open, uncluttered extension of the background scene (e.g. sky, simple landscape) to allow for text placement.

**SCENE DESCRIPTION:**
- Setting: A whimsical racetrack at twilight
- Action: Zayn, wearing his striped pajamas, is leaping over a finish line made of fluffy clouds, full of energy and joy. Rayan is running behind him, playfully trying to catch up with Zayn while holding a blue blanket. The background shows a dreamlike racetrack with stars and other whimsical elements.
- Mood: Exciting, Dreamlike
- Palette: Inherit strictly from IMAGE 1.

**MANDATORY OUTPUT RULES:**
- **Follow Visual DNA:** Strictly adhere to the rendering technique defined in IMAGE 1.
- **No Photography Rules:** Do not use realistic depth-of-field, bokeh, or cinematic lighting. Keep it painterly/illustrated.
- No typography, no letters, no watermarks.
- No split screen line — continuous panoramic image.

Prompt for spread 1:
**GOAL:** Generate a panoramic image with perfect style consistency for a 2D illustrated children's book.

**CHARACTER KEY & REFERENCE INPUTS:**
- **[MAIN CHARACTER] (Zayn):** Defined entirely by **IMAGE 1**. IMAGE 1 is the Master Reference for their face, hair, and the overarching artistic style of the book.
- **[SECONDARY CHARACTER] (Rayan):** Defined entirely by **IMAGE 2**. They are a 8 year old boy.

**ID & STYLE LOCK:**
- **FIXED ASSET MANDATE:** Zayn MUST match IMAGE 1 perfectly. Do not modify their facial features, body proportions, or the artistic rendering technique.
- Rayan MUST match IMAGE 2 perfectly. Place them in the scene alongside Zayn.
- You must **NOT** invent new lighting or rendering logic that conflicts with IMAGE 1. 

**COMPOSITION:**
- **SUBJECT PLACEMENT:** Place Zayn on the **RIGHT** side. Place Rayan ALSO on the **RIGHT** side, interacting naturally.
- **OPEN CANVAS:** The **LEFT** side must be open/uncluttered background for text. 
- **FRAMING:** Wide Establishing Shot. No dutch angles or extreme cinematic lenses.

**SCENE DESCRIPTION:**
- Setting: Zayn's bedroom (Indoor)
- Time of Day: Evening
- Action: Zayn bouncing on his bed.

**MANDATORY OUTPUT RULES:**
- **Inherit Technique:** Use the exact same brushwork, line quality, and color temperature as IMAGE 1.
- **Zero Realism:** Do not apply realistic photography physics (lighting decay, shadows). Keep the lighting consistent with the art style in IMAGE 1.
- **Anatomy:** Ensure correct number of limbs/fingers.
- No typography, lettering, or split lines.

inputs.theme: Learning the importance of rest to be ready for tomorrow's adventures.

customChallenge: The 'Shadows' look scary in the dark.
selectedStylePrompt: A detailed, atmospheric illustration style with a focus on dramatic natural lighting, grand scale, and immersive world-building.
technicalStyleGuide: Employ warm, directional lighting to highlight the subject's face and clothing, creating soft shadows and a golden, ethereal glow. Utilize soft, blended brushstrokes to achieve a smooth, painterly texture, minimizing harsh edges and emphasizing the dreamlike quality of the scene. Maintain a warm color temperature overall, with muted earth tones in the clothing and architecture contrasted by cooler blues and purples in the sky and background elements.
customIllustrationNotes: Bioluminescent corals, turquoise water, shimmering scales.
